title: Don't Build Agents, Build Skills Instead
subtitle: Event ledger — Barry Zhang & Mahesh Murag, Anthropic

claims.text: Agents have intelligence and capabilities but not always the expertise needed for real work

anchors.label: Barry Zhang & Mahesh Murag, Anthropic
anchors.quote: Agents have intelligence and capabilities, but not always expertise that we need for real work.

claims.text: The Anthropic team stopped building agents and started building skills instead

claims.text: Skills are deliberately simple organized folders
The remaining gap is domain expertise, not agent scaffolding
